allow: PowerShell($fia = "cursos/fia-labdata-analytics-ia-data-science"; git mv "$fia/README.md" "$fia/01-README.md"; git mv "$fia/curriculum.md" "$fia/02-curriculum.md"; git mv "$fia/study-plan.md" "$fia/03-study-plan.md"; git mv "$fia/weekly-roadmap.md" "$fia/04-weekly-roadmap.md"; git mv "$fia/glossary.md" "$fia/05-glossary.md"; git mv "$fia/concept-map.md" "$fia/06-concept-map.md"; Get-ChildItem "$fia" | ForEach-Object { $_.Name })
